definition: Capacity for trust reciprocity mutual aid social connection and collective action
measurement_note: Use bonding bridging and linking networks participation trust civic organizations isolation and mutual-aid evidence

definition: Capacity of local institutions to coordinate resources communicate and learn
measurement_note: Use staffing plans emergency coordination public finance governance quality after-action implementation and local organizational capacity

definition: Availability reliability affordability and accessibility of critical services
measurement_note: Use energy water health food transport communications housing shelters public space and resilience hub access

definition: Capacity for households workers and local businesses to absorb and recover economically
measurement_note: Use income savings insurance employment diversity debt small business continuity local procurement and anti-displacement measures

definition: Capacity for trusted accessible timely and actionable risk communication
measurement_note: Use warning reach multilingual access disability access trusted messengers misinformation monitoring and comprehension

definition: Capacity to learn revise plans innovate and transform under changing conditions
measurement_note: Use local knowledge scenario planning learning implementation governance flexibility and long-term adaptation planning

definition: Extent to which resilience protects vulnerable residents and shares power
measurement_note: Use exposure recovery access aid distribution displacement risk disability access language access and community authority

definition: Capital administrative political technical and civic burden required to implement a strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger feasibility review capacity planning and shared governance design
